manifest.geometric_growth_bound: per-substep ladder allows 10x operator absolute tolerance plus linear 2x/substep roundoff headroom; no tolerance was fit after comparison.

transfer_audit.note: Comparator reads HDF5 before isolated validation calls; no production timestep loop is executed.
